calls.query:
const r = await tools.exec_command({cmd:"sed -n '1,260p' AGENTS.md && sed -n '1,320p' .github/prompts/predict.md","workdir":"/home/runner/work/fedcourtsai/fedcourtsai","yield_time_ms":10000,"max_output_tokens":30000});
text(r.output);

const r = await tools.exec_command({cmd:"sed -n '1,280p' schemas/prediction.schema.json && sed -n '1,260p' schemas/agent_tooling.schema.json && sed -n '1,240p' schemas/agent_flags.schema.json && uv run fedcourts paths --court scotus --docket 73272489 --event evt-petition-disposition","workdir":"/home/runner/work/fedcourtsai/fedcourtsai","yield_time_ms":30000,"max_output_tokens":30000});
text(r.output);

const r = await tools.exec_command({cmd:"UV_CACHE_DIR=/tmp/uv-cache uv run fedcourts paths --court scotus --docket 73272489 --event evt-petition-disposition; rg --files | rg '73272489|evt-petition-disposition|statpack\\.md$'","workdir":"/home/runner/work/fedcourtsai/fedcourtsai","yield_time_ms":30000,"max_output_tokens":20000});
text(r.output);

const r = await tools.exec_command({cmd:"rg --files -uu | rg '(^|/)record/(context\\.json|documents\\.json|documents/|snapshots?/)|73272489' | head -300; env | rg '^(COURT_ID|DOCKET_ID|EVENT_ID|PREDICTOR_ID|RUN_ID|MODEL_ID|DECIDED_BEFORE|FEDCOURTS)'","workdir":"/home/runner/work/fedcourtsai/fedcourtsai","yield_time_ms":10000,"max_output_tokens":20000});
text(r.output);

const r = await tools.exec_command({cmd:"sed -n '1,240p' data/cases/scotus/73272489/events/evt-petition-disposition/event.yaml; sed -n '1,360p' data/cases/scotus/73272489/record/snapshots/2026-07-10.json; sed -n '1,240p' data/cases/scotus/73272489/record/documents/documents.json; sed -n '1,260p' data/cases/scotus/73272489/record/documents/questions-presented.txt; sed -n '1,420p' data/cases/scotus/73272489/record/documents/petition.txt; sed -n '1,240p' data/cases/scotus/73272489/record/context.js

const r = await tools.exec_command({cmd:"sed -n '421,900p' data/cases/scotus/73272489/record/documents/petition.txt; sed -n '901,1400p' data/cases/scotus/73272489/record/documents/petition.txt; wc -l -c data/cases/scotus/73272489/record/documents/petition.txt","workdir":"/home/runner/work/fedcourtsai/fedcourtsai","yield_time_ms":10000,"max_output_tokens":40000});
text(r.output);

const r = await tools.exec_command({cmd:"rg -n '^#{1,4} |Modern discretionary-cert|originating circuit|Ninth|California|2025 Term|2024 Term' metrics/statpack.md | head -220","workdir":"/home/runner/work/fedcourtsai/fedcourtsai","yield_time_ms":10000,"max_output_tokens":12000});
text(r.output);

const r = await tools.exec_command({cmd:"sed -n '1,90p' metrics/statpack.md; sed -n '220,330p' metrics/statpack.md; sed -n '330,520p' metrics/statpack.md","workdir":"/home/runner/work/fedcourtsai/fedcourtsai","yield_time_ms":10000,"max_output_tokens":30000});
text(r.output);

const r = await tools.exec_command({cmd:"wc -l metrics/statpack.md; tail -120 metrics/statpack.md","workdir":"/home/runner/work/fedcourtsai/fedcourtsai","yield_time_ms":10000,"max_output_tokens":20000});
text(r.output);

const r = await tools.exec_command({cmd:"UV_CACHE_DIR=/tmp/uv-cache uv run fedcourts query --help","workdir":"/home/runner/work/fedcourtsai/fedcourtsai","yield_time_ms":30000,"max_output_tokens":20000});
text(r.output);

const r = await tools.exec_command({cmd:"UV_CACHE_DIR=/tmp/uv-cache uv run fedcourts query --court scotus --disposition granted --limit 5 --corpus-backend ranged","workdir":"/home/runner/work/fedcourtsai/fedcourtsai","yield_time_ms":30000,"max_output_tokens":20000});
text(JSON.stringify(r));

const r = await tools.mcp__courtlistener__search({type:"o",court:"scotus",q:"\"not a court of error correction\" certiorari",order_by:"score desc",num_results:5,fields:["caseName","dateFiled","citation","absolute_url","snippet"]});
for (const c of (r.content||[])) { if (c.type==="text") text(c.text); else if (c.type==="image") image(c); }

const r = await tools.exec_command({cmd:"date -u +%Y-%m-%dT%H:%M:%SZ; test -e data/cases/scotus/73272489/events/evt-petition-disposition/predictions/codex-baseline/20260710T234542Z && echo EXISTS || echo ABSENT; git status --short -- data/cases/scotus/73272489/events/evt-petition-disposition/predictions/codex-baseline/20260710T234542Z","workdir":"/home/runner/work/fedcourtsai/fedcourtsai","yield_time_ms":10000,"max_output_tokens":5000});
text(r.output);

const r = await tools.exec_command({cmd:"UV_CACHE_DIR=/tmp/uv-cache uv run fedcourts validate data; git status --short; git diff --check; find data/cases/scotus/73272489/events/evt-petition-disposition/predictions/codex-baseline/20260710T234542Z -maxdepth 1 -type f -printf '%f\\n' | sort","workdir":"/home/runner/work/fedcourtsai/fedcourtsai","yield_time_ms":30000,"max_output_tokens":30000});
text(r.output);

const r = await tools.exec_command({cmd:"git status --short --untracked-files=all -- data/cases/scotus/73272489; sed -n '1,240p' data/cases/scotus/73272489/events/evt-petition-disposition/predictions/codex-baseline/20260710T234542Z/prediction.json; sed -n '1,320p' data/cases/scotus/73272489/events/evt-petition-disposition/predictions/codex-baseline/20260710T234542Z/reasoning.md; sed -n '1,240p' data/cases/scotus/73272489/events/evt-petition-disposition/predictions/codex-baseline/20260710T234542Z

const r = await tools.exec_command({cmd:"gh issue comment 556 --body 'Prediction cell completed: denied, P(grant) = 0.001. The data artifacts validate. Retrieval limitations and the missing modern discretionary-cert statpack section are recorded in the cell outputs.'","workdir":"/home/runner/work/fedcourtsai/fedcourtsai","yield_time_ms":30000,"max_output_tokens":5000});
text(r.output);
